vertical_split_selection.sort_order: descending by non_pk_column_count, then table name

base_predicate_sqls: (("deleted" IS NOT NULL AND "deleted" > 0 AND "deleted" <= 1) OR (("deleted" IS NOT NULL AND "deleted" > 1 AND "deleted" <= 1) OR ("deleted" > 1 OR "deleted" IS NULL)))
fragment_roles: rows where 0 < deleted <= 1 + rows where 1 < deleted <= 1 + rows where deleted > 1 or is NULL
image_locations||vfrag=created_at.fragment_role_B: rows where 0 < deleted <= 1 + rows where 1 < deleted <= 1 + rows where deleted > 1 or is NULL

fragment_roles: rows where created_at > 2021-01-28 17:22:32 or is NULL
rows where created_at > 2020-02-13 14:42:44 or is NULL

base_predicate_sqls: ((("name" = 'pulse' OR ("name" = 'neon6-34' OR "name" = 'twist')) OR ("name" = 'sonic' OR "name" = 'void SUSE 77.24')) OR (("name" = 'scope7-65' OR "name" = 'vortx3-49') OR ("name" = 'comet' OR "name" = 'pico6-60')))
("name" IS NULL OR "name" NOT IN ('pulse', 'sonic', 'void SUSE 77.24', 'scope7-65', 'vortx3-49', 'comet', 'pico6-60', 'neon6-34', 'twist'))
fragment_roles: rows where name = pulse + rows where name = neon6-34 + rows where name = twist + rows where name = sonic + rows where name = void SUSE 77.24 + rows where name = scope7-65 + rows where name = vortx3-49 + rows where name = comet + rows where name = pico6-60
rows where name is NULL or not in {'pulse', 'sonic', 'void SUSE 77.24', 'scope7-65', 'vortx3-49', 'comet', 'pico6-60', 'neon6-34', 'twist'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)
images||vfrag=checksum_2.fragment_role_A: rows where name = pulse + rows where name = neon6-34 + rows where name = twist + rows where name = sonic + rows where name = void SUSE 77.24 + rows where name = scope7-65 + rows where name = vortx3-49 + rows where name = comet + rows where name = pico6-60
images||vfrag=checksum_2.fragment_role_B: rows where name is NULL or not in {'pulse', 'sonic', 'void SUSE 77.24', 'scope7-65', 'vortx3-49', 'comet', 'pico6-60', 'neon6-34', 'twist'} (catch-all 'OTHER' bucket)

justification.cross_local_query_count_interpretation: Distinct cross-local workload queries where this fragment pair (different original tables) co-occurs; not an estimate of single-local queries after relocation.

relocation_engine_debug.pair_weight_meaning: Weights count co-occurrences of two fragments (from different original tables) inside workload queries that already span 2+ locals. They rank relocation candidates; they do not equal the number of queries that will become single-local after a move.
